usage: Load config via config.Load(); uses all config types (Telegram, Storage, OpenRouter, LLM, Refresh, Sources)
boundary — NewClient, NewTerminalAuth, ResolveChannel, FetchMessages, Message type
boundary — storage.Open(), Channels/Messages/SyncState DAOs, Store interface
boundary — NewTelegramFetcher, NewService, RefreshService interface, RefreshResult
boundary — Registry type and interface, Source.Name() method
boundary — NewService, NewOllamaClient, NewOpenRouterClient, Client interface, SummarizeQueueResult
boundary — NewApp, RefreshService interface, SummarizeService interface, AppOption, WithRefresh, WithSummarize
external — tea.NewProgram, tea.WithAltScreen for TUI rendering
external — tg.InputChannel type from Telegram client library
